{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Hyōzu Shrine'''|兵主神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Hyōzu shrine|lt=Hyōzu shrine|qid=Q135195551|1=Hyōzu shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11381626|ltq=Q11381626|qid=Q11381626|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|35.586194444444445|134.81097222222223}}

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Q135040685|ltq=Q135040685|qid=Q135040685|1=Hyōzu Shrine (Q135040685)}}
